'''Artel Darc''' was a [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]], who worked for [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was in charge of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces on [[Dagu]], where he enslaved the [[Rybet/Legends|Rybet]] inhabitants. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]] and her forces attacked Dagu. The [[Battle on Dagu]] was won for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Behind the scenes==
These events were going to be made into the novel ''[[Escape from Dagu]]'', but it was canceled. However, events in this novel entered continuity by being referred to in other media, specifically the Fact Files.

==Appearances==
*''[[Escape from Dagu]]'' {{C|Canceled}}
